diffs.patch:
Index: pyproject.toml
===================================================================
--- pyproject.toml	
+++ pyproject.toml	
@@ -1,112 +1,113 @@
 [build-system]
 requires = ["flit_core >=3.4,<4"]
 build-backend = "flit_core.buildapi"
 
 [project]
 name = "sphinxcontrib-sysml"
 version = "0.2.0"
 description = "Sphinx extension for SysML v2 need types and diagrams via sphinx-needs and PlantUML"
 readme = "README.rst"
 license = { file = "LICENSE" }
 authors = [{ name = "cpolzer", email = "coders@hai-fai.de" }]
 classifiers = [
   "Framework :: Sphinx",
   "Framework :: Sphinx :: Extension",
   "Development Status :: 2 - Pre-Alpha",
   "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
   "Operating System :: OS Independent",
   "Programming Language :: Python",
   "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
   "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
   "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
   "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
   "Topic :: Documentation",
 ]
 keywords = ["sphinx", "sysml", "sysml-v2", "plantuml", "sphinx-needs"]
 requires-python = ">=3.10"
 dependencies = [
   "sphinx>=4.0",
   "sphinx-needs>=1.0",
 ]
 
 [project.optional-dependencies]
 test = [
   "nox>=2025.2.9",
   "pytest>=7.0",
   "pytest-cov",
   "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
 ]
 docs = [
   "sphinx-immaterial",
   "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
 ]
 
 [dependency-groups]
 dev = [
   "pre-commit~=3.0",
   "nox>=2025.2.9",
   "mypy>=1.16.0",
   "ruff>=0.4.0",
   "commitizen",
   "detect-secrets",
 ]
 
 [tool.flit.module]
 name = "sphinxcontrib.sysml"
 
 [project.urls]
 Homepage = "https://github.com/user/sphinxcontrib-sysml"
 Repository = "https://github.com/user/sphinxcontrib-sysml.git"
 Documentation = "https://sphinxcontrib-sysml.readthedocs.io/"
 
 [tool.ruff.lint]
 extend-select = [
   "B",
   "C4",
   "FURB",
   "I",
   "ICN",
   "ISC",
   "N",
   "PERF",
   "PGH",
   "PIE",
   "SLF",
 ]
 
 [tool.mypy]
 packages = ["sphinxcontrib.sysml"]
 strict = true
 show_error_codes = true
 disallow_any_generics = true
 disallow_subclassing_any = true
 disallow_untyped_calls = true
 disallow_untyped_defs = true
 
 [[tool.mypy.overrides]]
 module = [
   "sphinx_needs",
   "sphinx_needs.*",
   "docutils",
   "docutils.*",
   "sphinx_need_svg",
   "sphinx_need_svg.*",
 ]
 ignore_missing_imports = true
 
 [tool.ruff]
 target-version = "py310"
+exclude = ["*.rst"]
 
 [tool.pytest.ini_options]
 testpaths = ["tests"]
 
 [tool.commitizen]
 name = "cz_conventional_commits"
 version = "0.2.0"
 version_files = [
   "pyproject.toml:^version",
   "sphinxcontrib/sysml/__init__.py:VERSION",
 ]
 tag_format = "v$version"
 update_changelog_on_bump = true
 changelog_file = "CHANGELOG.md"

parts.text: why are our project links at pypi wrongly set? https://pypi.org/project/sphinxcontrib-sysml/
Let me check the project's pyproject.toml or setup.py to see how the project links are configured.

state.title: pyproject.toml

parts.text:
The issue is clear - the project URLs in pyproject.toml use placeholder values:
- Homepage = "https://github.com/user/sphinxcontrib-sysml"
- Repository = "https://github.com/user/sphinxcontrib-sysml.git"

These should point to the actual GitHub repository. Let me check what the actual repo URL is.

The URLs in `pyproject.toml:57-60` use placeholder values (`github.com/user/...`). The actual repo URL needs to replace `user` with the real GitHub owner.

What's the correct GitHub owner/organization for this project?
